nasb.text: But when Simon Peter saw that, he fell down at Jesus’ feet, saying, “Go away from me Lord, for I am a sinful man!”

esv.text: But when Simon Peter saw it, he fell down at Jesus’ knees, saying, “Depart from me, for I am a sinful man, O Lord.”

cnv.text: 西門．彼得看見這種情景，就俯伏在耶穌膝前，說：“主啊，離開我，因為我是個罪人。”

ccb.text: 西门·彼得见状，便跪倒在耶稣膝前说：“主啊，离开我，我是个罪人！”

csbs.text: 西门彼得看见，就俯伏在耶稣脚前，说：“主啊，离开我吧，因为我是个罪人！”
